ksa_text: Knowledge of AI risk management roles, responsibilities, and accountability structures, including executive-level oversight design, RACI-based governance frameworks, cross-functional coordination models, and the organizational conditions required for effective AI risk decision-making.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although AI Governance is an edge domain for the Director of Data Engineering, this knowledge KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.467) and conceptual alignment to include at the director level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (AI Governance), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.467). External reviewers may question whether this specific knowledge KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Director of Data Engineering versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act (Article 9), and OECD AI Principles confirm AI governance as a critical competency for responsible AI leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with AI Governance appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Director of Data Engineering.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain AI Governance knowledge KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.467. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the Director of Data Engineering.
